mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT r.id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at, r.deleted FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1

SELECT DISTINCT p.id, p.permission_code, p.permission_name, p.permission_type, p.resource_path, p.http_method, p.description, p.status, p.created_at, p.updated_at, p.deleted FROM sys_permission p INNER JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON rp.permission_id = p.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rp.role_id INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = rp.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND ur.deleted = 0 AND rp.deleted = 0 AND r.deleted = 0 AND r.status = 1 AND p.deleted = 0 AND p.status = 1
